title: SDD CLI JSON envelope (Wave 26 §25 #3)
description: Stable envelope emitted on stdout by every `sdd <cmd> --json` invocation. Logs and progress bars are routed to stderr; data lives in the `data` field as a JSON object (never a top-level list).

schema_version.description: Envelope schema version. Increments are breaking changes; additive fields stay on v1.

ok.description: True when the command completed without errors. Mirrors process exit code 0.

data.description: Command-specific payload. MUST be a JSON object (map-form). Top-level lists are rejected to keep field-level evolution non-breaking.

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues; `ok` may still be true.

errors.description: Fatal issues; if non-empty, `ok` MUST be false.

location.description: Optional file path or other locator.
